publishedAbstract: - Installed the ODF 4.20.7 operator, configured the NAD in openshift-storage NS, and ran the [Multus validation tool](https://access.redhat.com/articles/7014721) successfully.- When creating the `storagecluster`, the NAD display in the dropdown lists for the public and private networks but it is not selectable. [image=[src="images/nad-not-selected.png", title="ODF UI Create Storage System", alt="ODF UI Create Storage System", size="LG- Large", data-cp-size="100%", caption="ODF UI Create Storage System",]]
publishedTitle: ODF Multus - GUI install Create Storage System - Unable to select NAD from dropdown list
